design_philosophy: A handcrafted digital experience created by a premium creative studio. Combines minimalism, futuristic editorial design, and interactive 3D storytelling. Atmospheric and emotionally engaging.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-[clamp(3rem,10vw,8rem)] font-black tracking-tighter leading-none uppercase text-[#E8E8E3]
hierarchy.h2_section: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#E8E8E3]

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical overlay layouts. Elements should span multiple columns irregularly to create tension and artful balance.

visual_effects.noise_overlay: SVG filter or CSS background with 2-4% opacity mix-blend-overlay to add film grain over the entire site.

components.cursor: Custom magnetic cursor. Use a framer-motion div, absolute positioned, fixed to window. Size 16px by default, expanding to 64px with mix-blend-screen and border when hovering interactive elements.
components.buttons: Magnetic effect on hover. No solid backgrounds unless CTA. Use 1px border border-[#E8E8E3]/20 with relative overflow-hidden and a sweep-fill effect in #D97736 on hover.
components.inputs: Floating label pattern. border-b only. border-[#E8E8E3]/20 bg-transparent text-xl py-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D97736] transition-colors

hero.layout: 100vh full bleed. Center aligned massive text overlay. Z-index layering: Text in front, 3D object in middle, background dark void.
hero.3d_object: R3F Liquid Chrome Monolith or Torus Knot, slowly rotating, reflecting an environment map with amber lighting.
hero.interactions: Object rotation tied to mouse movement. Scroll triggers downward translation of the 3D object to act as the storyteller in the next section.

about.layout: Split-screen. Left side (sticky) with cinematic portrait and overline. Right side deep scrolling typographic narrative.
about.interactions: Progressive text reveal. Opacity of words transitions from 10% to 100% as they enter viewport center.

projects.layout: Horizontal scroll container (GSAP ScrollTrigger or Framer Motion useScroll). Massive cinematic project images taking 70vw, with huge typography overlaid.
projects.interactions: Image hover applies scale(1.05) and desaturates slightly. Depth zoom effect.

skills.layout: Centered radial layout / orbit system. No standard progress bars.
skills.interactions: Words (WebGL, React, R3F, Motion) rotating in concentric circles using 2D Framer Motion or inside the R3F canvas as floating 3D text nodes.

contact.interactions: Morphing submit button, soft glow on input focus.

about_portrait.description: Cinematic portrait for the About section.

tech_stack_instructions.styling: Tailwind CSS with raw HTML/motion.divs for custom layouts. DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards for the main sections.
tech_stack_instructions.animation: Framer Motion for UI transitions. Lenis for smooth scrolling (MANDATORY). React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for the central 3D object.
tech_stack_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, orbit nodes) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'submit-contact-button').
tech_stack_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) to break the corporate tech look and maintain premium feel.
